series_metadata.series_title: Data Processing Disaster Preparedness and Recovery
series_metadata.series_description: Records related to the protection and reestablishment of data processing services, equipment and data (back-up files) in case of a disaster

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper until superseded by revised plan, then scan to electronic form for permanent retention. Then review by State Archives prior to disposal. ; Electronic: Retain permanently, Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Permanent
